title: Prompt Upsampling Flow
description: Enhancing short prompts into detailed descriptions via the prompt upsampler model with optional memory offloading
activity_flow: DECISION: word_limit_to_skip_upsampler is None OR word_count <= word_limit_to_skip_upsampler?
[No] → log skip reason, use raw prompt
→ run_chat_completion_vlm(prompt_upsampler, dialog, max_gen_len=400, temp=0.01, top_p=0.9) → returns enhanced str
DECISION: disable_guardrail == False AND prompt was upsampled?
CONTINUE: proceed with text embedding, generation, etc.
key_methods: __init__(enable_prompt_upsampler, offload_prompt_upsampler, prompt_upsampler_dir, ...): if enabled and not offload → _load_prompt_upsampler_model()
_run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt(image_or_video_path: str) -> str [Video2World]: calls prepare_dialog() then run_chat_completion_vlm(..., max_gen_len=400, temperature=0.01, top_p=0.9)
_run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt_with_offload(*args, **kwargs) -> str: optionally loads model, runs upsampling, optionally offloads
class_hierarchy: DiffusionVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline extends DiffusionText2WorldGenerationPipeline: overrides _load_prompt_upsampler_model (uses VLM), overrides _run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt (uses image/video path + VLM)
key_conditions: offload_prompt_upsampler=True: model loaded/deleted per call to reduce GPU memory
offload_prompt_upsampler=False (default): model loaded once in __init__, stays in memory
word_limit_to_skip_upsampler: if word_count > limit, upsampler is skipped for robustness
disable_guardrail=False: guardrail runs on both raw and upsampled prompts
important_notes: Video2World overrides both _load and _run upsampler methods — it uses a VLM (vision-language model) that takes an image/video path instead of text. The with_offload wrapper pattern is shared. Upsampler model stored as self.prompt_upsampler (None when offloaded). Offload path: del + gc.collect() + torch.cuda.empty_cache().
